Headline: 50 Damen Temporary Reroute at Damen & Ainslie
ShortDescription: 50 Damen buses are temporarily rerouted via Damen, Lawrence, Ashland, over regular route due to a fallen tree near Damen & Ainslie.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
50 Damen buses are temporarily rerouted via Damen, Lawrence, Ashland, over regular route due to a fallen tree near Damen & Ainslie. Opposite direction in reverse.

Allow extra travel time.
